content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Container with most water". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/container-with-most-water/
content.inputFormat: An array of integers representing the height of each line
content.outputFormat: The maximum area that can be trapped between the lines

solution.approach: Two pointers, one at the start and one at the end of the array, moving towards each other
